content.problemStatement:
You are given 333 sticks of length AAA, BBB and CCC.

Please check if they can be the side lengths of a valid non-degenerate triangle.

Recall that A,BA, BA,B and CCC can be the side-lengths of a non-degenerate triangle if and only if each of the following 333 conditions hold:


A+B>CA + B > CA+B>C
B+C>AB + C > AB+C>A
A+C>BA + C > BA+C>B

Input Format

The first and only line of input contains 333 integers - A,BA, BA,B and CCC.


Output Format
For each test case, output on a new line Yes\text{Yes}Yes if the side lengths form a valid triangle, and else No\text{No}No.


It is allowed to print each character in either case. For example, YES\text{YES}YES, yes\text{yes}yes and yEs\text{yEs}yEs will all be accepted as positive responses.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
All the conditions are satisfied and so it is a valid triangle.

Explanation:
The condition A+C>BA + C > BA+C>B is not true here, hence it is not valid.
